investigations.name: glazier-graner-1993
investigations.title: Glazier & Graner 1993 — differential-adhesion cell rearrangement
investigations.question: Can a single extended-Potts (Cellular Potts) model with only differential surface energies and an area constraint reproduce the full range of differential-adhesion-driven cell-rearrangement phenomena reported by Glazier & Graner (Phys. Rev. E 47, 2128, 1993)?
investigations.hypothesis: Varying only the type-dependent adhesion energies J(tau,tau') and the area constraint reproduces checkerboard mixing, complete and partial cell sorting, engulfment, position reversal, dispersal, and cavity formation, with matching patterns and topological statistics.
